properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v1 v2 v1 v2 v1 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: He's here, Elijah's God is in us today He's here to will and do whatever we say Behold the bride of Christ in full array He's here, Elijah's God is here

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: She walks in step with the revealed word of the hour She talks and demons flee before His mighty power Behold the Bridegroom united with His mate He's here, Elijah's God is here
